ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor data entry */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor that collected the data */,
  "time" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was recorded */,
  "ghi_pyr" REAL /* Global horizontal irradiance from pyranometer */,
  "ghi_rsi" REAL /* Global horizontal irradiance from reference sensor */,
  "dni" REAL /* Direct normal irradiance */,
  "dhi" REAL /* Diffuse horizontal irradiance */,
  "air_temperature" REAL /* Air temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "relative_humidity" REAL /* Relative humidity in percentage */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in m/s */,
  "wind_speed_of_gust" REAL /* Wind speed of gusts in m/s */,
  "wind_from_direction_st_dev" REAL /* Standard deviation of wind direction */,
  "wind_from_direction" REAL /* Wind direction in degrees */,
  "barometric_pressure" REAL /* Barometric pressure in hPa */,
  "sensor_cleaning" INTEGER /* Sensor cleaning status (0 - no cleaning, 1 - cleaned) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments about the data entry */,
  "data_version" INTEGER /* Version number of the data entry */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., sensor, manual input) */,
  "quality_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the data has been flagged for quality issues */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site where the data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES locations ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the sensor */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was installed */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., Pyranometer, Anemometer) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Operational status of the sensor (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site where the sensor is located */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Scheduled date of the next maintenance */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version of the sensor */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES locations ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Descriptive name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location in meters */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site where the location is located */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Time zone of the location */,
  "political_boundary" TEXT /* Political boundary of the location (e.g., country, state) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_types" (
  "sensor_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor type */,
  "sensor_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor type (e.g., Pyranometer, Anemometer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor type */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor type */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor type */,
  "calibration_frequency" INTEGER /* Recommended calibration frequency in days */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality control entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor data entry being assessed */,
  "is_valid" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the data is valid */,
  "issue_reported" TEXT /* Description of the issue reported with the data */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was resolved, if applicable */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quantitative measure of data quality */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the data quality */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the quality review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the system */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser, device) used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_settings" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., temperature, wind speed) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for triggering the alert */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the alert is active */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_settings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that was maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details regarding the maintenance performed */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "performed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_due" TEXT /* Scheduled date of the next maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_performed_by FOREIGN KEY ("performed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)
